'''Prishardia''' was a backwater [[Agriworld/Legends|agriworld]] that was located on the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] near [[Chad/Legends|Chad]].

==History==
During the [[Cold War (Galactic Republic–Sith Empire)|Cold War]] between the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] and the [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|reconstituted Sith Empire]], the [[Exchange]] taught one of their renegade employee a lesson and detonated his valuable agricultural silos on Prishardia.<ref name="Mission">{{TORcite|type=crewskill|Scavenging|Squealers Never Prosper}}</ref>

{{Planet-stub}}
